⚙️ Enter results

Set each match's winner and final score as games finish — standings update live below. When you're done, Download updated index.html and commit it to your repo (or Copy results data and paste it into the file). Results live in the file, not your browser, so the whole family sees the same standings.
● Unsaved changes — download or copy to keep them.
